universe_definition: Active members aged 18-65 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who have SMS opt-in and are not suppressed for SMS
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, prioritized by conversion rate weight
name: High-risk preventive care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e78%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive')
rationale: This bucket targets members with open preventive care gaps, which are most predictive of conversion. The message should emphasize the importance of preventive care and offer scheduling support.
suggested_treatment: Send SMS reminders about upcoming preventive care appointments with clear instructions on how to schedule.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members with no open care gaps or recent SMS engagement.

universe_definition: Active members aged 18-65 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who have SMS opt-in and are not suppressed for SMS
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, prioritized by conversion rate weight
name: Recent SMS repliers with open gaps
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e78%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')
rationale: This bucket targets members who have recently replied to SMS messages and have open care gaps. The message should be concise and action-oriented to maintain engagement.
suggested_treatment: Send brief, actionable SMS messages about their open care gaps with a clear call-to-action.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members with no open care gaps or recent SMS engagement.

name: Delivered SMS non-repliers with open gaps
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '65 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e78%') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'delivered' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')
rationale: This bucket targets members who have received SMS messages but have not replied and have open care gaps. The message should be more detailed and educational to encourage engagement.
suggested_treatment: Send detailed SMS messages about their open care gaps with educational content and a clear call-to-action.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members with no open care gaps or recent SMS engagement.
